verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's nothing like the Bride of Christ Her beauty is hidden in simplicity She's so in love with the Groom That She always wants to be by His side Veiled with His Word and washed in His holy Blood Without spot or wrinkle As perfect as she could be

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nowadays, a virtuous woman is hard to find It seems like everyone's the same A modern Jezebel with make up on her face Walking and prancing about With the tinkling of the feet Dancing and carrying on, Imagining mischief

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Dressed, oh, so modestly Her hair bouncing like a waterfalls She speaks in deep sincerity Love radiates from her life so consistently Walking in the Light of the day Her vessel's overflowing with oil Sharing in His righteousness A virgin to the Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: On Calvary as Jesus hang Dyin' up the Tree His side was pierced And the second Eve came to be

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: At Calvary as Jesus died Dying up the Tree His side was pierced And the second Eve came to be
